videos.title: Laparoscopic Management of Ruptured Rudimentary Horn Pregnancy with Massive Hemoperitoneum
videos.description: Rudimentary horn pregnancy is a rare and life-threatening form of ectopic pregnancy associated with a Müllerian anomaly, with an incidence of approximately 1 in 76,000 to 150,000 pregnancies. Despite its rarity, it carries a high risk of rupture (80–90%), often in the late first or early second trim

videos.description: Iatrogenic Fimbrial Herniation into the Uterine Cavity What appears to be a routine endometrial polyp turns out to be the fimbrial end of the fallopian tube — herniated into the uterine cavity following repeated uterine instrumentation. videos.title: TLH with Grade IV Endometriosis | Unexpected Advanced Disease & Complete Excision
videos.description: A routine Total Laparoscopic Hysterectomy (TLH) in a P3L3 patient revealed unexpected Stage / Grade IV endometriosis, demonstrating how severe disease can remain hidden until surgery. videos.title: Yabuki Space - A Critical Landmark
videos.description: During bladder dissection, always be aware of the ureteric re-entry—where the ureter turns medially to enter the bladder, below the ureteric tunnel.
